name: AppsFlyer API
description: AppsFlyer API for mobile attribution, analytics, and marketing automation. Provides access to raw data reports, measurement APIs, SKAN APIs, ROI analytics, and audience management. Authentication varies by endpoint - some use Bearer tokens, others use API keys.
